title: Thematic Subway Map
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning knowledge domains into subway-map diagrams with clear topology, transfer logic, structured hierarchy, and commercial-grade transit visual language.

en.title: Thematic Subway Map
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning knowledge domains into subway-map diagrams with clear topology, transfer logic, structured hierarchy, and commercial-grade transit visual language.

zh-CN.title: X 主题地铁路线图
zh-CN.description: 把莎士比亚戏剧、哲学史、AI 发展史或中国朝代等知识体系抽象为地铁路线图,测试关系可视化、线路拓扑和商业制图质感。
